prediction.reasoning: The price prediction for PLD in 3 days is generated using a Geometric Brownian Motion model. This model utilizes historical data to estimate the average daily return (drift) and daily volatility. For this prediction, an approximate daily drift of 0.03% and daily volatility of 1.4% were used. The point estimate represents the expected price after 3 days, incorporating this drift. The confidence intervals are constructed by projecting the range of possible prices based on the historical volatility and standard statistical z-scores corresponding to the desired confidence levels (50%, 80%, 90%). It is crucial to remember that stock price predictions are inherently uncertain and subject to various market factors and unforeseen events.
